// from_bid64 -- decimal64 (BID) -> decimal128 widening decode (exact; a
// strict subset, so never rounds/signals). Baked from the Intel readtest.in
// bid64_to_bid128 oracle: flag==00 vectors only (sNaN/invalid inputs carry a
// nonzero flag and are excluded, since the quiet decode cannot signal), minus
// 7 qNaN-payload vectors where libbid left-justifies the payload (a libbid bug;
// we preserve the raw payload -- covered by native nanpayload/serde instead).
// Operand = 16-hex bid64 in brackets; result = the [32-hex bid128] encoding.
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [0000000000000000] -> [2d240000000000000000000000000000]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [0000000000000001] -> [2d240000000000000000000000000001]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [0000000000000064] -> [2d240000000000000000000000000064]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [0000000000989e50] -> [2d240000000000000000000000989e50]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [00001231276e5fb2] -> [2d2400000000000000001231276e5fb2]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [000462d53c8abac0] -> [2d24000000000000000462d53c8abac0]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [00071b33671d6160] -> [2d2400000000000000071b33671d6160]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [0020000000000000] -> [2d260000000000000000000000000000]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [002462d53c8abac0] -> [2d26000000000000000462d53c8abac0]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [0040000005f62f23] -> [2d280000000000000000000005f62f23]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [00a0000005f62f23] -> [2d2e0000000000000000000005f62f23]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [01a0000000000000] -> [2d3e0000000000000000000000000000]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [01a0000000000001] -> [2d3e0000000000000000000000000001]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [2fe71afd498d0000] -> [302200000000000000071afd498d0000]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [3000b5e620f48000] -> [30240000000000000000b5e620f48000]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [302012309ce54000] -> [3026000000000000000012309ce54000]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [304001d1a94a2000] -> [3028000000000000000001d1a94a2000]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [3060002e90edd000] -> [302a0000000000000000002e90edd000]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [30800004a817c800] -> [302c00000000000000000004a817c800]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [30a0000077359400] -> [302e0000000000000000000077359400]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [30c000000bebc200] -> [3030000000000000000000000bebc200]

d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [3120000000030d40] -> [30360000000000000000000000030d40]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [3140000000004e20] -> [30380000000000000000000000004e20]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [31600000000007d0] -> [303a00000000000000000000000007d0]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [31800000000000c8] -> [303c00000000000000000000000000c8]
d128_from_bid64 TIES_TO_EVEN [31a0000000000014] -> [303e0000000000000000000000000014]
